chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَجِّ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/109)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/109)
text: لَمْ يَحُجَّ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بَعْدَ قُدُومِهِ الْمَدِينَةَ إِلَّا وَاحِدَةً وَ قَدْ حَجَّ بِمَكَّةَ مَعَ قَوْمِهِ حِجَّاتٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Giyas Bin Ibrahim,

(It has been narrated) from Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Prophet<sup>saww</sup> did not perform Hajj, after proceeding to Al-Medina, except for one, and he<sup>saww</sup> had performed Hajj in Makkah along with his<sup>saww</sup> people, (many) Hajjs’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad, from Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, performed only one hajj from al- Madinah; however, he had performed al-Hajj many times when in Makkah along with his people.’”
